title: Fermented Gooey Nostalgic Spanish Leek Stir-fry
description: A low-carb friendly fermented and gooey dish featuring poached leeks with a touch of nostalgia.
instructions: In a bowl, mix lime juice and red pepper flakes. Set aside.
Heat oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium heat.
Add sliced leeks to the hot oil. Cook for about 5 minutes until they become translucent.
Drizzle the prepared lime-lime-flavored mixture over the leeks.
Mix unsweetened coconut milk into the stir-fry evenly, stirring well with a spatula.
Cook until the liquid has thickened and absorbed by the leeks, about 3 more minutes.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
